calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioners Yanfei Hou and Guoxin Zhong (father/mother) present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for and with the minor Lin Zhong Hou, placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to Nancy Zhong.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
